examples: The experience was something he had tried to expunge from his memory.
Expunge this junk from the requirements document.
Wonder when to expunge that kitchen sponge from your life?
Only nine states that collect DNA from arrestees automatically expunge samples from individuals who are not eventually convicted, court papers said.
Your attorney should threaten to sue any source of defamatory information about you who refuses to expunge the information from your credit files.
